package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

// scenario for aws_credential_hardcoded: `credentials.NewStaticCredentials("AKID...", "secret...", "")` with literal access keys
// fixture polarity: negative; family: library; severity: error.
type Rule403NegativeRecord struct {
	client *http.Client
}

func scenario403Negative(ctx context.Context, holder Rule403NegativeRecord, url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := holder.client
	if client == nil {
		client = &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
	}
	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, http.MethodGet, url, nil)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return client.Do(req)
}
